TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Otis_Birdsong, title = Otis_Birdsong, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Otis_Birdsong} }

S.FORM: Otis Birdsong sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1955, ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 9, Otis Birdsong, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Otis Birdsong sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1955, ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 9, Otis Birdsong, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: otis~ɕ βir*s~ɕoŋ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, otis~ɕ βir*s~ɕoŋ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
